responsibilities: Create detailed 3D parametric models and 2D engineering drawings for mechanical parts and assemblies
Apply GD&T principles per ASME Y14.5 standards to define precise manufacturing and inspection tolerances
Maintain and organize CAD libraries, part numbering systems, and drawing templates within the PDM environment
Translate sketches, specifications, and design intent from engineers into accurate, manufacturable CAD models
Collaborate with mechanical engineers to update designs based on design reviews and test feedback
Manage engineering change orders and revision control to ensure drawing accuracy across the product lifecycle
Perform interference checks and large assembly modeling to verify fit across complex multi-part systems
Generate bill of materials and configuration data to support procurement and manufacturing handoff
Support reverse engineering efforts by modeling existing components from physical measurements or scan data
